title: Persistent morning fog
author: Meteorological observation
content: Heavy mist that lingers well past sunrise in a valley.
action: A calm, clear, and sunny day is typically set to follow.

title: Spiderwebs in the grass
author: Field observation
content: Dew-covered webs appearing thick and widespread across a field in the early morning.
action: The air is stable and humidity is high, favoring dry, pleasant conditions.

title: Pine cones closing tight
author: Biological indicator
content: Pine cones on the ground or tree limbs tightly sealing their scales.
action: The surrounding air moisture is increasing, often ahead of a weather change.

title: Tree frogs calling
author: Ecological signal
content: An unusually loud and collective chorus of tree frogs during the day.
action: They are reacting to rising humidity levels, indicating damp weather is approaching.

title: Smoke rising straight
author: Atmospheric indicator
content: Smoke from a chimney or campfire rising in a thin, vertical column without dispersing.
action: High-pressure air is present, suggesting settled and fair weather.
